posts.author: Deafzone (Tony Barlow)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is request for additional information on the list of installed apps that come up when you click on the jigsaw piece top right corner and then clicking on “Installed apps” to bring up a table of installed apps.

It is so hard to see which app is free and which paid we are currently subscribing to. It would be very helpful to have information available on this table of installed apps so we can see what we are paying for. It is very clunky trying to go into each app and search for billing page and checking if we are subscribing or not.

Thanks
